global.description: The ad features a blue gradient background with prominent text and call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to order an exclusive offer tonight.

elements.label: Blue gradient background
elements.description: A smooth blue gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Exclusive tonight
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Exclusive tonight' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Start free today
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Start free today'.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button in white with the text 'Order now' in bold.

elements.label: Graphic element
elements.description: An abstract shape consisting of an oval and a rectangle, lightly outlined.

elements.label: Graphic element
elements.description: Another abstract shape, similar to the previous one, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Graphic element
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape, also lightly outlined, located in the center.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: Text at the bottom urging viewers to take action, saying 'Order now'.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner, labeled 'NeonCast' in a modern font.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag in the top left corner labeled 'UGC', indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, and the CTA button is at the bottom.
